nation: Mohawks of the Bay of Quinte
economic_notes: Band owns Yaote Holdings Limited (100%), Yaote ET Wind Inc. (100%), Yaote LS Solar Inc. (100%). Yaote LS Solar Inc. holds 50% of Loyalist Solar LP (a government business enterprise - solar power facility in Ontario). Yaote ET Wind Inc. has investment in Ernestown LP wind power project. Band also has Fibre to the Home operations and various capital infrastructure projects.
notes: Financial statements are for fiscal year ended March 31, 2020. Prior year (2019) figures were restated to include Investment in Loyalist Solar LP ($14,661,149) and related loan payable to BluEarth Renewables Partnership ($14,363,649) that had been omitted. Three wholly-owned subsidiaries consolidated: Yaote Holdings Limited, Yaote ET Wind Inc., Yaote LS Solar Inc. Loyalist Solar LP (50% owned GBE) accounted for on modified equity basis. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($26,078,590) + Health and Welfare ($2,795,449) + CMHC ($304,862) + Other Federal ($32,406) + Province of Ontario ($6,510,551) + AIAI ($978,301) + County of Hastings ($160,774) + OFNLP2008 ($4,568334) = $41,429,267 approximately; OSR calculated accordingly. Long-term debt includes loans payable $7,972,212 plus loans payable Yaote LS Solar Inc. $15,882,035 = $23,854,247. Detailed program-level expense breakdown available in supplementary statements but not extracted from this text. Remuneration schedules referenced but not included in extracted text. Band located on Tyendinaga Mohawk Territory, Ontario.
